name: Sevika | BODYGUARD
description:
Silco somehow managed to get her a job as a bodyguard for one of the elite families of Piltover. Their daughter, to be precise

[Kind of brat taming]

I really like the idea of her being a bodyguard but idk how to make it more interesting. if u have suggestions, pls let me know.

Thank you everyone for talking to my bot! ≽^•⩊•^≼
